summary: Free Hobby user asked how to solve git/agent push problems without Pro subscription. Advised local-only workflow: Cursor local Agent, existing Git Credential Manager for push, skip Cloud Agent and GITHUB_TOKEN setup. Repo already synced on GitHub with scaffold on main/work.
current_status: Free tier viable path: develop and push locally. Uncommitted local changes: AGENTS.md and bash push scripts. Cloud Agent not required.
